We’ve actually made the body lighter in recent updates to improve handling, so it should feel a bit easier now. If it still feels very heavy, there’s a chance a modifier might be affecting it 😅
We’d love for you to give it another try, and if it feels better, updating your rating would really help us a lot 🙏

You can also join our Discord to share tips or feedback

reviews.review_description:
welp. Idk what gus did to us but apparently it lead to his death. Now we gotta drag him around and hide him literally anything we can. we also gotta hide the evidence but that’s one of the easier parts of it. when you finish doing the dirty work you sadly gotta open the door to the cops that I personally call Jon and Ron. If you hid ur (past) bestie gus well enough they will let you go with a kind goodbye 😊

but to be so fr rn this game is hilarious and works perfectly, 5 stars

developer_response.body:
😂😂 This made our day, thank you for the amazing review!

We love how perfectly you captured the spirit of the game… poor Gus really went through it 😅
Dragging him around, hiding the evidence, and nervously opening the door for Jon and Ron is exactly the kind of chaotic fun we hoped players would enjoy.

We’re really glad everything ran smoothly for you and that you had such a great time with it. Thanks a ton for the 5 stars and for embracing the madness. Gus would (probably) forgive you. 🫣💀

reviews.review_description: Good game, but the body limbs are hard to control.

Thanks for the feedback! 💀
We hear you: improving limb control is something we’re planning to work on. Appreciate you playing!

reviews.review_description: Nice game

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words, means a lot!

reviews.review_description:
I tried this game out, and I was laughing all the time. This is a very humorous game.
Don’t know how heavy that guy is, but he just didn’t move how I wanted it.

Check out my my YT channel for my gameplay: https://youtu.be/5zEXMc5g2t0?si=cRz4lOjYe5FBHyfL .

Recording is from my 2nd attempt. My first round I forget to hide the evidence. 

Love this game.

developer_response.body:
Thanks a ton for the awesome review! 😂🙌

We’re really glad the game kept you laughing, that chaotic, “why won’t this body move?!” feeling is very much intentional 😄

And forgetting to hide the evidence on the first run? You’re definitely not alone… it happens to the best of us 😉

Huge thanks as well for sharing your gameplay on YouTube and supporting the game like this; it truly means a lot to the team. ❤️

We’re happy you’re having fun, and we hope your future attempts are a little… cleaner 😏

reviews.review_title: Very fun game but where are the options?
reviews.review_description:
EDIT

Omg I feel so dumb lol.  I'm just used to an icon that you can see to access options, like a door or a picture, I didn't even think of using the options button.  Thanks for the response.  Review is now 5 stars!!  Developer cares about their players.

Would give the game 5 stars if there was a way to change from click turning to smooth turning and to turn off the walking vignette.  I couldn't find any options screen.  The tutorial didn't have one and in the menu there wasn't one I could see.  Please, if the developers see this, either add an options screen or please tell me how to access it.  Tbh, I only played for about 10 minutes so far, but i absolutely hate click turning.  I'm sure there's an option in there and I'm just dumb not being able to find it.

developer_response.body:
Hi,
Thanks for your review! We're glad you're enjoying the game so far and want to help you have the best experience possible.
To access the options menu, press the option button on the left pad—it provides both the settings you're looking for, including smooth turning and the ability to turn off the walking vignette, as well as some additional features.
We understand how important customization is for comfort and immersion, so if you have any other suggestions or run into issues, feel free to let us know. We’d love to earn that 5-star rating from you!
Happy hiding,
The Hide The Corpse Team

reviews.review_title: Impossible to grab and move body!
reviews.review_description:
First game I've ever refunded. I love the concept of this game and really wanted to like it, but the hand mechanics are abysmal. 

I understand the developer wanting to make it difficult to hide the corpse or to simulate the real life difficulty of moving the body, but it just makes it frustrating when even trying to move an arm is a near impossible task requiring multiple attempts due to your hands just 'letting go' by itself - far too frustrating.

developer_response.body:
We’re truly sorry to hear about your experience and appreciate you sharing your thoughts. It’s unfortunate that the gameplay didn’t meet your expectations, especially since you liked the concept—we want every player to enjoy and succeed in Hide The Corpse.

It’s possible that playing while seated might have impacted the mechanics, as the game is designed for standing gameplay. That said, we’d love to help you get the most out of the experience! Please consider joining our Discord community where you can connect with other players who’ve mastered the mechanics, and share more about your thoughts. We’re here to support you and help you overcome the frustrations you’ve encountered.

Thanks again for giving the game a chance, and we hope to hear from you soon!

Best regards,
Realcast Team
Discord : https://discord.gg/awVrSXcqB6

reviews.review_description: Very fun! I love how the body actually "feels" heavy. Lots of replayability.

reviews.review_description: I really can't get enough of this game! It's constant fun trying to quickly find a spot for the body and rush to hide all the evidence.  I hope the developers continue to update the game with new locations. It's the perfect game for the family,  taking turns to see who does a better job! Highly recommend it, buy it now!

developer_response.body: We’re pumped that you’re having a blast, and new locations are definitely on the horizon! Have you thought about speedrunning it? We'd love to see your times on speedrun.com. Stay tuned for more updates and keep hiding like a pro! 😎

reviews.review_description:
This is a funny and unique puzzle game that blends dark humor with strategic thinking. you’re tasked with hiding a body while avoiding detection. 
The puzzles are well-designed, offering a good balance between challenge and fun. As you advance through the levels, the complexity ramps up, requiring careful planning and creativity to solve. 
Visually, the game has a quirky art style that complements its offbeat nature, and the soundtrack adds to the overall tension without becoming overwhelming. The pacing is spot on, with each level taking just the right amount of time to complete, ensuring the game stays addictive and never feels repetitive.
Highly recommended for anyone who enjoys a challenge with a side of dark humor!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the awesome review! We're thrilled you're enjoying the dark humor and puzzles. There's more to come—stay tuned, and keep hiding those bodies like a pro! 😄

reviews.review_description: The when dragging or carrying the body it has this little line thing that when it turns red then your grip breaks and it’s so stupid when trying to hide the “corpse” because you can’t even pick it up to put it in a hiding place you can only drag it so it’s impossible to put in a hiding place

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! The hand mechanics are intentionally designed to simulate the weight of a body, making it realistically challenging to hide—because, you know, bodies aren’t exactly light. Most players love the extra difficulty, but we get that it might not be everyone's cup of tea. Sorry it didn’t quite click for you.

reviews.review_description: How do I get past the wardrobe? I can’t pick anything. Help ! I’m stuck !

developer_response.body: Hello! Thanks for playing our game! You’re likely just starting out, so only one skin is unlocked initially. Head back to the menu and complete the hiding spots in the apartment. After successfully hiding in four spots, you’ll unlock a new level—and possibly some new skins too! If you’re enjoying the game, please consider updating your rating. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Man, this is one of those great titles. It's awesome to shown your friends and it's fast paced. You get 4 minutes and that's it. The corpse is dead weight, it can be frustrating but it's meant to be and pulled off brilliantly. Trying to stuff the body into a container against the clock with the cops closing in is anxiety inducing and hilarious at the same time. It's a blast to play and well thought out. I recommend grabbing this one in early access because the price is great. My only gripe is it needs more content which I'm certain is coming with the full release. Great job devs. This is a really fun game to play, great VR title.

developer_response.body: Hey, check the game now, full version is out with new levels, enjoy!

reviews.review_title: So much fun, going to be huge
reviews.review_description:
Disclosure -  won a code from Developers as a prize

This is genuinely so much fun, and a brilliant idea for a game. It's amazing how quickly you become a methodical 'cleaner', taking mental notes of where you've left fingerprints and being as efficient as possible to maximise the time bonus. The fact that the genuinely awesome IK physics on the body and the weight mechanics work so well together make this harder than you ever expect, and when you open the door early for the (gloriously dim) cops having put items back and cleaned up all your prints, you totally feel like some kind of criminal mastermind. I'm hoping the devs will inject more drama into the police investigation, because there's a lot of tension sometimes when you open that door - or they come busting in - and it would be nice if the payoff could feel a little more rewarding and contextual to your work. Sometimes the camera can jank here as well - I've been placed in the cupboard with the corpse while the cops are visible through a door I've just caused to open when it moved me, and this has happened a couple of times. 

I've been recommending this game to everybody. In it's current state it's still cooking but already very tasty; there's half the levels there, and a few bits of jank, but the content that's there is pretty robust, polished, and lot of fun. Musically it's great and the art style is really successful. Tom looks great and wangles about brilliantly, just the right side of rubber-limbed chaos and it's judged perfectly for the gameplay. Structurally it feels like I Expect You To Die,  but rather than replaying whole levels just to put on a hat or grab an easter-egg you missed, here there are 6 different ways to 'get away with it' in each location, and it's genuinely puzzling to try and figure these out -- and so replays feel more engaging because of it.  
This game feels primed to explode, the concept sounds amazing and it delivers.

developer_response.body: Wow, that's THE REVIEW 🙏 Hope you already enjoyed the full version !

reviews.review_description: This game is a blast!  We use it as a party game, cast it to the TV.  Hope you can keep adding stuff. Loving the 70s vibe!  🫠🤙

developer_response.body:
Hey, thanks for your review. Yes, we realized that the game is also a lot of fun to watch others play. 
The full version is available now with new levels and much more to discover! Update your game and have fun!

developer_response.body: Hey Ian, The new version is available with new levels, please try and get back to us on Discord : https://discord.gg/C66gMgYm

reviews.review_description:
absolutely love this game! it’s definitely a keeper, cant wait for more content to be added which im sure its going to be just as good. 

I love what has been implemented into the initial room that was taped off previously! It’s absolutely genius! 

This really ramps up the game and forces you to drag that body around, and get the body part you need in order to find that perfect hiding spot. 

But be warned it’s not that easy and it’s not long before the cops burst 💥in on you 😅

Weekend at Bernie’s springs to mind 😂🤣

well done great game.

developer_response.body:
Hey Tom, “you're a legend!” a joke from the trailer :) Thanks so much for your support. The full version is available now with new levels and many surprises. Go get it now!
Thanks!

reviews.review_description:
"Hide the Corpse is such a perfect implementation of a simple idea. With its wonderful aesthetic, and weighty physics system, it’s the perfect game to show VR off to your friends. Even though the full release is a couple of months away, it’s a game I would highly recommend grabbing in its early access form as what is here is great. No doubt when the game is finally complete, it will become one of my favourite Meta Quest 3 games."

Full review at The Elite Institute

developer_response.body: Thanks for beautiful review, we know you love our game, and thanks for your involvement to make the game recognized everywhere! 🙌

reviews.review_description:
Great dark humour game that has a ton of replayability. It's really simple to pick up snd get playing, and so far there's three different scenarios. 

For the price it's pretty decent - considering there's more being added. The only concern I have is the mechanics of grabbing and moving the corpse or other items. 

I didn't notice in the brief tutorial, but it's not explained that you need to watch the blue markers on your hands when moving things, as the more you move the earlier it'll be to lose your grip. 

While I understand the mechanic makes the game challenging, but if anyone was hiding a corpse in real life, this wouldn't be an issue - I'd just lift the body in a way that was quicker to move and more comfortable. 

Also, description says there is a price for early access and another for full game. Are we supposed to pay again when the full game releases?

developer_response.body: Hello, Thanks for very interesting feedback, we'll take it into account for the improvements. Don't worry you've bought the game at Early Access price, the full game will be updated automatically when released.

reviews.review_description: This game is perfect to play taking turns with friends as a party game. It’s hilarious fun!! Just one more go.

developer_response.body: Go get the full version and invite friends again 🎉

reviews.review_description: An absolute blast to play with friends

developer_response.body: Thank you, we're delighted to know you're sharing the joy with your friends. More to come!

reviews.review_description:
Got this tonight with the 50% discount thank you . Had a few goes and it's so funny! And not easy to hide a body in 4 mins lol
Really feel like you're there and really hurrying before the police arrive.
I absolutely love the 70s theme and decor ! 
Looking forward to what's to come with this game, will definitely recommend it to others .
Let's you live out your sick and twisted fantasy without actually risking real prison ha ha.
But poor Burt Reynolds or is it Tom selleck !? 
You'll see what I mean if you play the game.
